critiques.finding: Fourth footer Button bTJCv (style_ref:bTJCv, IR label Continue Path) is absent from PathDetailPopup footer ai_RNbBHYJu; decompose review C-3 deferred this to PATHS-03 implement.

critiques.finding: Three in-scope ui_ref wrapper groups (ai_RNbBHYJR header-text, ai_RNbBHYJg steps-group, ai_RNbBHYJp progress-bar-wrap) are flattened in React hierarchy while child markers remain.
critiques.alternative: Insert data-bubble-id wrappers matching IR parent_element_id chain for parity tooling without changing layout.

critiques.finding: After enrollInPath succeeds, Paths.tsx keeps a stale viewingEnrollment snapshot; popup CTA state does not reflect refreshed store until close/reopen.
critiques.alternative: Sync viewingEnrollment from usePathsEnrollmentStore after refresh or derive enrollment prop from store by enrollmentId.

critiques.finding: Decompose target_files lists frontend/src/pages/PathDetail.tsx but implementation lives in PathDetailPopup.tsx; legacy PathDetail route page remains unchanged prototype session UI.
critiques.alternative: Document mapped_target_files in coverage (already maps .vue to PathDetailPopup.tsx) or retire /paths/:slug PathDetail route if popup supersedes it.

critiques.finding: DialogOverlay carries ai_RNbBHYMU bubble id but omits data-style-ref Group_overlay_ from ui_refs.
critiques.alternative: Apply bubbleStyle('Group_overlay_') or data-style-ref on DialogOverlay for style catalog parity.
